summary: Iteration 2 validates GoROAM rebrand (splash screen, sage/cream theme), AI concierge (Roamie) FAB + modal with Gemini integration, and 7 new settings sub-pages. All 26 backend pytest cases pass (including 2 new AI search tests). Frontend UI flow verified end-to-end on mobile viewport (390x844). One environmental issue: Emergent LLM key budget exhausted during live UI test so AI chat returns graceful error in bubble (backend/code works fine; budget needs topping up).

integration_issues.issue: POST /api/ai/search returned HTTP 500 during UI test with detail 'litellm.BadRequestError ... Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0033, Max budget: 0.001'. Pytest earlier in the run (when budget was available) passed with a valid Gemini response, so endpoint code is correct — the Emergent LLM key budget just ran out. AI modal gracefully shows the backend error text in an assistant bubble. Link chips ([stay-x]/[pkg-x]) could not be verified in UI because no successful AI reply was received, but the parser + onPress wiring in app/ai.tsx MessageBubble is implemented correctly.

react_native_issues.issue: Metro logs spam 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' — cosmetic warning only, no runtime impact. Consider migrating theme.shadow to boxShadow on web targets.

action_items: Top up / rotate EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget so live AI chat works end-to-end in UI (backend endpoint itself is verified correct).
Optional: replace deprecated shadow* props in src/theme.ts with boxShadow for cleaner web console.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py correctly excludes MongoDB _id everywhere (projection {"_id":0} or pop after insert).
ai/search endpoint builds catalog context and instructs Gemini to include [stay-x]/[pkg-x] tags — frontend parses these into tappable chips correctly.
MessageBubble regex `/\[(stay-[a-z0-9-]+|pkg-[a-z0-9-]+)\]/gi` correctly captures both prefixes.
Splash screen at app/index.tsx auto-redirects with setTimeout(1200ms) and cleans up timeout — correct.
Settings uses a single dynamic [page].tsx route with switch-based content — clean and maintainable.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_auratravel_api.py (added TestAiSearch class with validation + live Gemini response tests)

success_rate.frontend: ~95% — all UI flows verified (splash, theme, FAB, AI modal open, all 7 settings sub-pages navigation, profile). Only AI response rendering blocked by external LLM budget limit.

seed_data_creation: None; uses admin@auratravel.com/admin123 seeded by backend + TEST_ prefixed users created via register API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 26 backend tests green. AI endpoint depends on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget — if tests fail with 500 'Budget has been exceeded', refresh the key. Frontend URL: https://travel-stays-38.preview.emergentagent.com/. Splash auto-redirects in 1.2s. All settings pages use testID menu-{slug} (personal/payments/notifications/privacy/help/terms/about).
rca_of_issue: AI UI chip verification failed only because Emergent LLM budget (max 0.001) was exceeded during live UI test. Pytest that ran ~30 min earlier got a successful Gemini response (200 OK visible in backend logs). Mitigation: top up the Emergent LLM key; no code changes needed.
